//A

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Options du client API CBP (section « Cbp » de appsettings).</summary>
public sealed class CbpApiOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "Cbp";

    /// <summary>URL de base de l'API CBP.</summary>
    [Required]
    public Uri? BaseUrl { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Chemin relatif de l'endpoint des transactions.</summary>
    public string TransactionsPath { get; set; } = "/api/transactions";

    /// <summary>
    /// Statuts demandés. Défaut effectif si non configuré : ["ALL"].
    /// (laissé vide : le binder concatène à la valeur par défaut d'un tableau.)
    /// </summary>
    public string[] Status { get; set; } = [];

    /// <summary>Délai d'attente par requête (secondes).</summary>
    [Range(1, 600)]
    public int TimeoutSeconds { get; set; } = 100;

    // L'authentification se fait par bearer token injecté par CbpBearerTokenHandler
    // (récupéré via Secret Server) — aucun secret ici.
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// DTOs du contrat HTTP CBP (découplés du domaine).
// ⚠️ À ALIGNER sur le contrat réel de l'API CBP (noms/formats à confirmer).
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/// <summary>Paramètres de requête CBP (dates au format YYYYMMDD).</summary>
public sealed class CbpTransactionRequest
{
    [JsonPropertyName("requestId")]
    public required string RequestId { get; init; }

    [JsonPropertyName("status")]
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Status { get; init; }

    [JsonPropertyName("fromTradeDate")]
    public required string FromTradeDate { get; init; }

    [JsonPropertyName("toTradeDate")]
    public required string ToTradeDate { get; init; }
}

/// <summary>Enveloppe de réponse CBP : statut de la requête + transactions si succès.</summary>
public sealed class CbpResponse
{
    [JsonPropertyName("requestId")]
    public string? RequestId { get; set; }

    /// <summary>
    /// « isSuccess » : booléen présent **uniquement en cas d'échec** (= <c>false</c>).
    /// Absent (⇒ <c>null</c>) en cas de succès. Cf. <see cref="Succeeded"/>.
    /// </summary>
    [JsonPropertyName("isSuccess")]
    public bool? IsSuccess { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("errorCode")]
    public string? ErrorCode { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("transactions")]
    public List<CbpTransactionDto> Transactions { get; set; } = [];

    /// <summary>Succès tant que « isSuccess » n'est pas explicitement <c>false</c> (absent ⇒ succès).</summary>
    [JsonIgnore]
    public bool Succeeded => IsSuccess != false;
}

public sealed class CbpTransactionDto
{
    [JsonPropertyName("transId")]
    public string? TransId { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("status")]
    public string? Status { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("symbol")]
    public string? Symbol { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("tradeAction")]
    public string? TradeAction { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("notionalCurrency")]
    public string? NotionalCurrency { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("userNm")]
    public string? UserNm { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("customerRef")]
    public string? CustomerRef { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("channelID")]
    public string? ChannelId { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("comment")]
    public string? Comment { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("nearDateDetail")]
    public CbpLegDto? NearDateDetail { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("farDateDetail")]
    public CbpLegDto? FarDateDetail { get; set; }
}

/// <summary>Détail d'une jambe. Dates au format YYYYMMDD.</summary>
/// <remarks>
/// ⚠️ AMBIGUÏTÉ SPEC à confirmer : pour la near leg, le champ portant le taux
/// all-in (mappé sur FX_RATE) est nommé « tradeRate » ici ; la spec liste un
/// « tradeDate » pour la near leg dont la signification (= taux) semble être une
/// coquille. Aligner sur le vrai payload CBP.
/// </remarks>
public sealed class CbpLegDto
{
    [JsonPropertyName("tradeRate")]
    public decimal TradeRate { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("valueDate")]
    public string? ValueDate { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("tradeDate")]
    public string? TradeDate { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("currency1Amt")]
    public decimal Currency1Amt { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("currency2Amt")]
    public decimal Currency2Amt { get; set; }

    [JsonPropertyName("salesMargin")]
    public decimal SalesMargin { get; set; }
}

/// <summary>
/// Adapter CBP (ResultSet A). HttpClient typé ; le bearer token est injecté par
/// <see cref="CbpBearerTokenHandler"/>. Traduit toute panne / réponse en erreur en
/// <see cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException"/>.
/// </summary>
public sealed class CbpTransactionSource(
    HttpClient httpClient,
    IOptions<CbpApiOptions> options,
    ILogger<CbpTransactionSource> logger) : ICbpTransactionSource
{
    private const string CbpDateFormat = "yyyyMMdd";
    private readonly CbpApiOptions _options = options.Value;

    public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(range);

        var request = new CbpTransactionRequest
        {
            RequestId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"),
            Status = _options.Status.Length > 0 ? _options.Status : ["ALL"],
            FromTradeDate = range.FromTradeDate.ToString(CbpDateFormat, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
            ToTradeDate = range.ToTradeDate.ToString(CbpDateFormat, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
        };

        try
        {
            logger.LogInformation("Appel API CBP {Path} requestId={RequestId} [{From}..{To}].",
                _options.TransactionsPath, request.RequestId, request.FromTradeDate, request.ToTradeDate);

            using var httpResponse = await httpClient.PostAsJsonAsync(_options.TransactionsPath, request, cancellationToken);
            httpResponse.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();

            var response = await httpResponse.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CbpResponse>(cancellationToken)
                ?? throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.Cbp, "Réponse CBP vide.");

            if (!response.Succeeded)
            {
                throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(
                    TransactionSource.Cbp, $"CBP a renvoyé une erreur (errorCode={response.ErrorCode}).");
            }

            return response.Transactions.Select(Map).ToArray();
        }
        catch (HttpRequestException ex)
        {
            throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.Cbp, "Échec d'appel à l'API CBP.", ex);
        }
        catch (TaskCanceledException ex) when (!cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested)
        {
            throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.Cbp, "Timeout d'appel à l'API CBP.", ex);
        }
    }

    private static CbpTransaction Map(CbpTransactionDto dto)
    {
        var nearDto = dto.NearDateDetail ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($"Transaction CBP {dto.TransId} sans nearDateDetail.");
        return new CbpTransaction
        {
            TransId = dto.TransId ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("Transaction CBP sans transId."),
            Status = dto.Status ?? string.Empty,
            Symbol = dto.Symbol ?? string.Empty,
            TradeAction = CbpTradeActionExtensions.Parse(dto.TradeAction),
            NotionalCurrency = dto.NotionalCurrency ?? string.Empty,
            UserNm = dto.UserNm,
            CustomerRef = dto.CustomerRef ?? string.Empty,
            ChannelId = dto.ChannelId ?? string.Empty,
            Comment = dto.Comment,
            NearLeg = MapLeg(nearDto),
            FarLeg = dto.FarDateDetail is null ? null : MapLeg(dto.FarDateDetail),
        };
    }

    private static CbpLeg MapLeg(CbpLegDto dto) => new(
        TradeRate: dto.TradeRate,
        ValueDate: ParseDate(dto.ValueDate),
        TradeDate: ParseDate(dto.TradeDate),
        Currency1Amt: dto.Currency1Amt,
        Currency2Amt: dto.Currency2Amt,
        SalesMargin: dto.SalesMargin);

    private static DateOnly ParseDate(string? value) =>
        DateOnly.ParseExact(value ?? string.Empty, CbpDateFormat, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
}





//B


using System.Net;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

public sealed class CbpTransactionSourceTests
{
    private static readonly VerificationDateRange Range =
        new(new DateOnly(2026, 4, 30), new DateOnly(2026, 5, 1));

    private static CbpTransactionSource CreateSource(HttpStatusCode status, string json)
    {
        var httpClient = new HttpClient(new StubHttpMessageHandler(status, json))
        {
            BaseAddress = new Uri("http://localhost"),
        };
        var options = Options.Create(new CbpApiOptions { BaseUrl = new Uri("http://localhost") });
        return new CbpTransactionSource(httpClient, options, NullLogger<CbpTransactionSource>.Instance);
    }

    private static Task<IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction>> GetAsync(string json) =>
        CreateSource(HttpStatusCode.OK, json).GetTransactionsAsync(Range, CancellationToken.None);

    [Fact]
    public async Task Maps_NonSwap_Transaction_From_Response()
    {
        // Arrange
        const string json = """
        {
          "requestId": "r1",
          "transactions": [
            {
              "transId": "T1", "status": "TRADE_DONE", "symbol": "USDCAD",
              "tradeAction": "B", "notionalCurrency": "USD", "userNm": "marc.andre",
              "customerRef": "BIOVEPHAR", "channelID": "SDP", "comment": "x",
              "nearDateDetail": {
                "tradeRate": 1.355555, "valueDate": "20260501", "tradeDate": "20260501",
                "currency1Amt": 3000, "currency2Amt": 4065, "salesMargin": 0.000162
              }
            }
          ]
        }
        """;

        // Act
        var result = await GetAsync(json);

        // Assert
        var tx = Assert.Single(result);
        Assert.Equal("T1", tx.TransId);
        Assert.Equal("TRADE_DONE", tx.Status);
        Assert.Equal("USDCAD", tx.Symbol);
        Assert.Equal(CbpTradeAction.Buy, tx.TradeAction);
        Assert.Equal("USD", tx.NotionalCurrency);
        Assert.Equal("marc.andre", tx.UserNm);
        Assert.Equal("BIOVEPHAR", tx.CustomerRef);
        Assert.Equal("SDP", tx.ChannelId);
        Assert.Equal("x", tx.Comment);
        Assert.False(tx.IsSwap);
        Assert.Null(tx.FarLeg);

        Assert.Equal(1.355555m, tx.NearLeg.TradeRate);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 5, 1), tx.NearLeg.ValueDate);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 5, 1), tx.NearLeg.TradeDate);
        Assert.Equal(3000m, tx.NearLeg.Currency1Amt);
        Assert.Equal(4065m, tx.NearLeg.Currency2Amt);
        Assert.Equal(0.000162m, tx.NearLeg.SalesMargin);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Maps_Swap_With_Near_And_Far_Legs()
    {
        // Arrange
        const string json = """
        {
          "requestId": "r1",
          "transactions": [
            {
              "transId": "S1", "status": "TRADE_DONE", "symbol": "USDCAD",
              "tradeAction": "BS", "notionalCurrency": "USD", "customerRef": "C", "channelID": "SDP",
              "nearDateDetail": {
                "tradeRate": 1.3, "valueDate": "20260501", "tradeDate": "20260501",
                "currency1Amt": 1000, "currency2Amt": 1300, "salesMargin": 0.0001
              },
              "farDateDetail": {
                "tradeRate": 1.31, "valueDate": "20260601", "tradeDate": "20260501",
                "currency1Amt": 1000, "currency2Amt": 1310, "salesMargin": 0.0001
              }
            }
          ]
        }
        """;

        // Act
        var result = await GetAsync(json);

        // Assert
        var tx = Assert.Single(result);
        Assert.Equal(CbpTradeAction.BuySell, tx.TradeAction);
        Assert.True(tx.IsSwap);
        Assert.NotNull(tx.FarLeg);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 1), tx.FarLeg!.ValueDate);
        Assert.Equal(1.31m, tx.FarLeg.TradeRate);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("B", CbpTradeAction.Buy)]
    [InlineData("S", CbpTradeAction.Sell)]
    [InlineData("BS", CbpTradeAction.BuySell)]
    [InlineData("SB", CbpTradeAction.SellBuy)]
    public async Task Parses_TradeAction_Variants(string raw, CbpTradeAction expected)
    {
        // Arrange
        var json = $$"""
        {
          "transactions": [
            {
              "transId": "T1", "status": "TRADE_DONE", "symbol": "USDCAD", "tradeAction": "{{raw}}",
              "notionalCurrency": "USD", "customerRef": "C", "channelID": "SDP",
              "nearDateDetail": { "tradeRate": 1.3, "valueDate": "20260501", "tradeDate": "20260501",
                "currency1Amt": 1, "currency2Amt": 1, "salesMargin": 0 }
            }
          ]
        }
        """;

        // Act
        var result = await GetAsync(json);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(expected, Assert.Single(result).TradeAction);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Throws_When_IsSuccess_Is_False()
    {
        // Arrange — échec : isSuccess présent (= false) + errorCode.
        const string json = """
        { "requestId": "r1", "isSuccess": false, "errorCode": "E123", "transactions": [] }
        """;

        // Act + Assert
        await Assert.ThrowsAsync<TransactionSourceUnavailableException>(() => GetAsync(json));
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Returns_Empty_When_No_Transactions()
    {
        // Arrange — succès : pas de champ isSuccess (absent ⇒ succès).
        const string json = """{ "requestId": "r1", "transactions": [] }""";

        // Act
        var result = await GetAsync(json);

        // Assert
        Assert.Empty(result);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Throws_When_Http_Error()
    {
        // Arrange
        var source = CreateSource(HttpStatusCode.InternalServerError, "{}");

        // Act + Assert
        await Assert.ThrowsAsync<TransactionSourceUnavailableException>(
            () => source.GetTransactionsAsync(Range, CancellationToken.None));
    }
}
